title: The Quiet Village
target: find out why no smoke has risen from Stelm village in eight days, and bring word back to the fort

contributions.line: [mock] Roselle (Female) takes on "enter the village by the cart-path without being seen by whatever waits".
[mock] Imogen (Female) takes on "read the dead — what killed Stelm, and is it still here".

outcomeNarrative: [mock] A bruised partial; find out why no smoke has risen from Stelm village in eight days, and bring word back to the fort slips half-grasped, but no one is broken.
